prompt: 用 idea-flow 帮我整理一下想法：我们团队有十几个人，内部文档散落在飞书、Notion、Google Docs 和各种 Git 仓库里，找东西很痛苦，想搞个统一的内部知识库。

assertions.text: Response summarizes what the user has already stated before asking
Response asks at least one clarifying question
Response asks only ONE main question
Response does NOT generate a complete solution/plan in the first turn
[NEW] Response does NOT start with '好的，我来用 idea-flow...' or explain what idea-flow is
